Detailed Description

This class represents the interface of a datagram packet

Definition at line 31 of file Datagram.java.

Member Function Documentation

String javax::microedition::io::Datagram::getAddress (  ) 

Get the datagram's address

Returns:
a string holding the address or null if it was not set
byte [] javax::microedition::io::Datagram::getData (  ) 

Gets the data held by the data buffer

Returns:
a byte array holding the data buffer
int javax::microedition::io::Datagram::getLength (  ) 

Gets the length of the datagram

Returns:
the datagram's length
int javax::microedition::io::Datagram::getOffset (  ) 

Gets the offset of the datagram

Returns:
the datagram's offset
void javax::microedition::io::Datagram::reset (  ) 

Resets the access pointer, the offset and the length

void javax::microedition::io::Datagram::setAddress ( String  address  )  throws IllegalArgumentException, IOException

Sets the datagram address

Parameters:
address the new address in URL form
Exceptions:
IllegalArgumentException if the address is invalid
IOException if an error occurs
void javax::microedition::io::Datagram::setAddress ( Datagram  datagram  )  throws IllegalArgumentException

Sets the datagram address from another datagram

Parameters:
datagram source datagram for the address
Exceptions:
IllegalArgumentException if the address is invalid
void javax::microedition::io::Datagram::setData ( byte[]  new_buffer,
int  new_offset,
int  new_length 
) throws IllegalArgumentException

Sets the buffer, offset and length of the datagram

Parameters:
new_buffer the new data buffer
new_offset the new offset into the data buffer
new_length the new length of the data in the buffer
Exceptions:
IllegalArgumentException if the new length exceeds the buffer or if the new_buffer parameter is invalid
void javax::microedition::io::Datagram::setLength ( int  new_length  )  throws IllegalArgumentException

Sets the length of the datagram

Parameters:
new_length the new length
Exceptions:
IllegalArgumentException if the new length exceeds the buffer
